title: rapuntium decurrens
side_effects: Rapuntium decurrens can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe allergic reactions, nausea, and dizziness. In rare cases, excessive consumption may lead to respiratory issues, including asthma-like symptoms and shortness of breath. Improper use of this plant can also cause stomach irritation, resulting in heartburn, diarrhea, and abdominal pain. Furthermore, prolonged exposure to the plant's active compounds can lead to headaches, fatigue, and weakened immune system.
